taxonomy: Bipontia velutina is classified as a species of moth in the family Gelechiidae. It belongs to the genus Bipontia, with Bipontia being a genus of moths in the subfamily Gelechiinae. The classification of Bipontia velutina is further divided into the kingdom Animalia, phylum Arthropoda, class Insecta, and order Lepidoptera. Within the class Insecta, it is placed in the superorder Endopterygota. Further classification includes family Gelechiidae, genus Bipontia, and species B. velutina.
